testcase.name: test_invalid_proxy
testcase.failure:
def get(self, repeat=False): '''Returns a working proxy that matches the specified parameters.''' proxy_list = self.get_proxy_list(repeat) if self.random: random.shuffle(proxy_list) working_proxy = None for proxy_address in proxy_list: proxies = {self.schema: f'http://{proxy_address}'} try: > working_proxy = self.__check_if_proxy_is_working(proxies) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
fp/fp.py:78: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ fp/fp.py:93: in __check_if_proxy_is_working with treq.get(url, proxies=proxies, timeout=self.timeout, stream=True) as r: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/treq/api.py:23: in get return _client(kwargs).get(url, headers=headers, _stacklevel=4, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <treq.client.HTTPClient object at 0x110f23fd0> url = 'http://https://www.google.com' kwargs = {'_stacklevel': 4, 'headers': None, 'proxies': {'http': 'http://111.111.11:2222'}, 'stream': True, ...}
def get(self, url: _URLType, **kwargs: Any) -> "Deferred[_Response]": """ See :func:`treq.get()`. """ kwargs.setdefault("_stacklevel", 3) > return self.request("GET", url, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: HTTPClient.request() got an unexpected keyword argument 'proxies'
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/treq/client.py:151: TypeError
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:
self = <test_proxy.TestProxy testMethod=test_invalid_proxy>
def test_invalid_proxy(self): test = FreeProxy() test.get_proxy_list = MagicMock(return_value=['111.111.11:2222']) > self.assertRaisesRegex( FreeProxyException, 'There are no working proxies at this time.', test.get)
test_proxy.py:21: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
def get(self, repeat=False): '''Returns a working proxy that matches the specified parameters.''' proxy_list = self.get_proxy_list(repeat) if self.random: random.shuffle(proxy_list) working_proxy = None for proxy_address in proxy_list: proxies = {self.schema: f'http://{proxy_address}'} try: working_proxy = self.__check_if_proxy_is_working(proxies) if working_proxy: return working_proxy > except treq.exceptions.RequestException: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'treq' has no attribute 'exceptions'
fp/fp.py:81: AttributeError
